Name: EXAMPLE_EXPORT_SSRSREPORT
Description:
EXAMPLE_EXPORT_SSRSREPORT

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails with attachments, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_ExportSsrsReport, the clr_ReportExportToFile is employed to export a SSRS report to file (PDF).
Author: Josh
